About Me

Roots in curiosity,
driven by research.

I'm an aspiring AI Researcher specializing in Large Language Models and Small Language Models integration. My work focuses on building efficient, scalable, and context-aware language systems that bridge the performance gap between high-capacity and lightweight models.

Motivated to contribute to research in multimodal AI, model compression, and low-resource NLP applications — I believe the future of AI lies in making powerful models work everywhere.

Python PyTorch TensorFlow Hugging Face LangChain React FAISS Firebase SQL LLM Fine-tuning NLP Pipelines RAG
Selected Work

Projects

Building at the intersection of AI and real-world impact

01

Lecture AI System

Full-stack AI web app that automatically transcribes, summarizes, and translates educational audio lectures. Built a RAG Q&A engine using FAISS vector search and FLAN-T5 for context-aware answers.

React Python Flask FAISS Whisper BART
↗
02

MindfulPath

Digital wellbeing platform promoting mental health with AI-powered conversational support. Built within 24 hours at a hackathon — LLM integration for personalized guidance, Firebase for real-time data.

React Firebase LLM API
↗
03

CAPTCHA Breaking via CNN

Research project — CNN model to decode CAPTCHA images using image segmentation, augmentation, and feature extraction. Compared multiple architectures, serving as foundation for LLM-guided visual reasoning.

Python TensorFlow OpenCV
↗
04

Dream 11 Predict App

Web app predicting the best Dream 11 playing XI using real-time player stats. LLM prompt engineering to evaluate player form, with ranking algorithm and performance visualization dashboard.

React Node.js MySQL REST APIs
↗
